_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Oversee and make recommendations regarding configuration management.
reference_document_element_description: Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications, including environment configuration, dependency specification, secrets management, and environment parity maintenance.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.539), AI-T-021 (AI, cosine: 0.491).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.524). Shared vocabulary: [configuration, management]. DCWF-only terms [make, oversee, recommendations, regarding] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, data, dependency, development, environment, environments] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.886, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Oversee and make recommendations regarding configuration management." and "Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.563 ≈ STS 0.524 (gap 0.039). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [configuration, management] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [configuration, management]. DCWF-only: [make, oversee, recommendations, regarding]. WIDAI-only: [applications, data, dependency, development, environment, environments].

signals.detail: STS 0.524 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
